Miniature dressmaker's salon: fabric cutting table, dress forms with garments, pattern tissue papers, button selection trays, ribbon storage, sewing machines, fitting room curtain, pressing station.

Dollhouse biology lab: microscope stations, petri dish incubators, specimen preservation jars, dissection trays, skeleton models, plant growth chambers, safety equipment, lab notebooks, staining solutions.
Model flour mill: water wheel exterior, grinding mechanism, grain elevator, sifting equipment, bagging station, quality testing, storage silos, miller's office, delivery carts outside.
Miniature bookbinding atelier: sewing frames, board cutting, cloth covering materials, gold tooling stamps, pressing equipment, edge gilding, marbled endpapers, finished volumes stacked, work orders.
